testCases.scenario: AC1: Visit the website and log in with the given credentials
testCases.testCase: Sign in with the provided credentials and land on the location picker
testCases.preCondition: Browser open at /login; account 'developers@moontower.com' exists; Email + Password fields and Sign In button visible
testCases.expectedResult: App leaves /login and redirects to /select-location (the location-picker screen)
testCases.linkedTestTitle: AC1-POS-01 — valid credentials log in and reach the location picker

testCases.scenario: AC2: After login the 'Select Your Location' prompt is shown
testCases.testCase: The 'Select Your Location' heading is visible after a successful login
testCases.preCondition: Logged in with valid credentials; on /select-location
testSteps: Log in with the provided credentials
testCases.expectedResult: The heading 'Select Your Location' is visible
testCases.postCondition: User remains on /select-location awaiting a location choice
testCases.linkedTestTitle: AC2-POS-01 — the "Select Your Location" prompt is shown after login

testCases.scenario: AC3: Click 'Main Location' and verify the dashboard URL
testCases.testCase: Choosing 'Main Location' routes to the inventory-vendors dashboard
testCases.preCondition: Logged in; on /select-location with the 'Main Location' button visible
testSteps: Log in with the provided credentials
testCases.postCondition: User is on the inventory-vendors dashboard (Inventory sub-view by default)
testCases.linkedTestTitle: AC3-POS-01 — choosing "Main Location" opens the inventory-vendors dashboard

testCases.scenario: AC4: Click on the Inventory tab
testCases.testCase: Clicking the Inventory sidebar tab activates the Inventory view
testCases.preCondition: Logged in and on the /inventory-vendors dashboard; the left sidebar nav (Dashboard, Inventory, Quick Inventory, Vendors, Orders, …) is visible
testSteps: Log in with the provided credentials
Wait for the dashboard sidebar to finish loading
Click the 'Inventory' tab in the left sidebar
testCases.expectedResult: Inventory view is active: the 'Inventory' heading is visible, the URL stays https://moontower.aiimone.com/inventory-vendors, and the Inventory tab is highlighted (active styling)
testCases.postCondition: User is working in the Inventory section of the dashboard
testCases.linkedTestTitle: AC4-POS-01 — clicking the Inventory tab activates the Inventory view
